title: equisetum lyi
intro: Equisetum lyi, also known as the Chinese horse tail, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum lyi include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Equisetum lyi is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
